headline: Cadence (CDNS) Stock Looks Strong On Returns But Rich On Earnings
summary: Cadence Design Systems stock has delivered a strong 169.8% return over the past 5 years, yet the current valuation checks point to a company that screens as expensive rather than a clear bargain. A 169.8% return over 5 years highlights how strongly the market has rewarded Cadence Design Systems, which raises the bar for what future performance may need to justify today’s price. The expanded Intel Foundry collaboration and agentic AI virtual engineer offering can support expectations for...
